commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a2caeab67457a7e1be1e68cc3bf773bf97d2dfa0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shouldRepair wiring to doctor session snapshot health so openclaw doctor --fix rewrites stale bundled skill paths in sessions.json, plus a standalone reproduction script.

PR surface: Source +73, Other +258. Total +331 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection shows a high-confidence current-main path: doctor detects stale snapshot findings but noteSessionSnapshotHealth has no repair flag and the doctor flow does not pass shouldRepair. I did not run a live doctor repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for real patched-command proof and session-state-safe code changes; ClawSweeper repair should not be queued while the external proof gate is unsatisfied.
